title: Channel Capability Baseline
objective: Install a deterministic Kova channel into a real OpenClaw gateway, inject channel turns through OpenClaw's channel runtime, and emit one baseline proof row for every OpenClaw channel capability.

phases.title: Provision Channel Baseline Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova auth and the test channel plugin are installed before plugin discovery.

phases.title: Install Kova Channel Baseline Plugin
phases.intent: Install the deterministic Kova channel plugin into the selected OpenClaw runtime exactly through the user-visible plugin install path.

phases.title: Start Gateway With Baseline Channel
phases.intent: Start the OpenClaw gateway after auth and plugin installation so channel startup and gateway method registration happen through the normal runtime path.

phases.title: Run Durable Final Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the baseline plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw injects channel turns, dispatches replies, routes durable final sends through the channel message adapter, and records durable final capability evidence.

phases.title: Run Live Preview Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the baseline plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw exercises live preview state, update, streaming, and quiet finalization behavior through the shared channel runtime.

phases.title: Run Live Finalizer Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the baseline plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw exercises final edit, fallback, discard, receipt, and ambiguous failure handling through the shared live finalizer path.

phases.title: Run Ack Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the baseline plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw exercises receive acknowledgement policy timing and idempotency through the shared channel receive context.
